title: Doesn't OpenAI have every incentive to destroy HuggingFace?
excerpt: Just wondering about this, because I don't think I've seen it said plainly. Hugging Face is the place where all us home-labbing AI enthusiasts get our models from.
content_html:
Just wondering about this, because I don't think I've seen it said plainly. Hugging Face is the place where all us home-labbing AI enthusiasts get our models from.

Aka, at the end of the day, OpenAI's likely mortal enemy. It feels like no one is mentioning this point, am I missing something?

Hugging Face is the place where all us home-labbing AI enthusiasts get our models from.Aka, at the end of the day, OpenAI's likely mortal enemy. content_html_zh:
只是想知道这一点，因为我认为我没有看到它说得很清楚。 Hugging Face 是我们所有家庭实验室人工智能爱好者获取模型的地方。

归根结底，OpenAI 可能是不共戴天的敌人。 感觉好像没有人提到这一点，我是不是漏掉了什么？
